3.  [Rectangle Flags](https://www.banners.com/custom-flags/rectangle-flags)
4.  14.5 Foot Rectangle Flag

# 14.5 Foot Rectangle Flags

### Custom 14.5 Foot Rectangle Flags

![Custom 14.5ft rectangle flag displaying the days timestamps for the river city rockets for an event | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/153e820c718d4672ab872fb799b97fff.jpg)

 

 

 

 

 

*   [Product Overview](#171f86f5-224a-45e5-a52a-2a845c298275)
*   [Template](#9e2b870e-e9a6-43aa-a6bf-c9474a8a033a)

#### [Material](#materialCollapse)

Rectangle flags are printed using a direct dye-sublimation printing process on our flag material. Direct dye-sublimation printing means that the ink goes through the material instead of just sitting on top of the material.

Our fabric material is temperature sensitive and due to the printing process it can expand and contract due to heat or cold. Because of this we cannot guarantee the exact size of any fabric product due to temperature fluctuations. We are not responsible for any product received that is too small or big for your purposes. If the size needs to be precise, such as if it is being installed into an existing frame or hardware, please express this to your CSR to discuss your specific application.

#### [Base Options](#base-optionsCollapse)

**4 Leg Standard Base**

![4 Leg Standard Base](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/4-Leg-Standard-Base_450x450px-KB_RIOT.jpg)

The 4 Leg Standard Base is intended for indoor use.

**Heavy Duty Cross Foot Base**

![Heavy Duty Cross Foot Base](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Heavy-Duty-Cross-Foot-Base_450x450px-KB_RIOT.jpg)

The Heavy Duty Cross Foot Base is intended for indoor or outdoor use.

**Spike Base**

![Spike Base](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Spike-Base_450x450px-KB_RIOT.jpg)

The Spike Base is intended for outdoor use.

#### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse)

#### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse)

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps files — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

#### [Design Templates](#design-templatesCollapse)

If you would like to design your own rectangle flags, you can download our template and upload it. We will check the artwork and send you a proof to verify that everything looks ok before we send your order into production.

![Rectangle Flags](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-16/Rectangle%20Sail%20Signs%20-%20Lawnsigns.com.jpg)

Rectangle Flag Templates

**7 Foot Rectangle Flags**

[29"W x 60.75"H Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/7%20ft%20Rectangle%20Flag.pdf)

**10 Foot Rectangle Flags**

[29"W x 92.25"H Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/10%20ft%20Rectangle%20Flag.pdf)

**14.5 Foot Rectangle Flags**

[29.5"W x 148.75"H Template](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/14.5%20ft%20Rectangular%20Flag.pdf)

#### [Artwork/Order Proofs](#artworkorder-proofsCollapse)

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

#### [Color Match Proof System](#color-match-proof-systemCollapse)

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

#### [Production Times](#production-timesCollapse)

### Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

3 Business Days Express:

Need your product faster? 3 Day Express is for you.

![3 Business Day Standard Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-3 Business Days Standard-compressed.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 5 Business Days Saver:

This is our most popular fabric turnaround option. Free and fast enough for most custom orders

![5 Business Day Saver](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-5 Business Days Saver-compressed.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 7 Business Days Saver:

If you aren't in a hurry, you can save some money by choosing our 7 Day Saver option.

![7 Business Day Saver](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-12-BANS-production time infographic-7 Business Days Saver-compressed1.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### [Payment](#paymentCollapse)

All banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.](https://www.banners.com/resources/online-orders-pay-with-check).

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

#### [Shipping](#shippingCollapse)

#### [General Shipping Guidelines](#general-shipping-guidelinesCollapse)

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

**You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.**

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

**International shipping Notes:**

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Please [visit our shipping information page](https://www.banners.com/shipping-info) for more information about our 14.5 Foot Rectangle Flag shipping options.

#### [Shipping Maps](#shipping-mapsCollapse)

**Rectangle Flags**

This product is produced in our Minnesota facility only.

#### [Shipping Methods](#shipping-methodsCollapse)

We offer the following shipping methods:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )

Three Day ( 3 Business Days )

Two Day ( 2 Business Days )

Overnight ( 1 Business Day )

UPS Overnight AM

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

**Did we answer all your questions?**

If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Use custom rectangle flags to obtain maximum exposure for your business or upcoming events. These flags can be printed single or double sided! Your signage is printed using the dye sublimation process that cures the ink right into the material. This method produces eye-popping displays that everyone will be sure to see! The pole hardware comes with a one year warranty provided it is properly installed and maintained.

Please upload your 60 MB or smaller print ready file. Acceptable file formats include: .eps, .pdf, or high resolution .tiff or .jpg. Typically 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best.

**For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.**

## 14.5 Foot Rectangle Flags - Order Your Custom Made Flag Online!

  
 

Printed on our high quality mirror fabric material, these flags are bold and durable. Fabric [banners and flags](https://www.banners.com/) are printed using direct dye sublimation. This method results in eye-catching displays! You can use these giant flags for advertising indoors and outdoors.

Properly installed and maintained pole hardware is backed by a one year warranty. The poles are constructed from a sturdy yet nimble Carbon Composite that is tougher than flag poles with aluminum bases.

### Order your 14.5 Foot Rectangle Flag Online!

*   Select the quantity of flags that you need
*   Choose your Options
    *   Pole Hardware
    *   Base Type
        *   Which base type you desire
*   Upload your artwork files

You will receive a proof from a customer service representative before your order goes into production.

## Frequently Asked Questions

####   
What material are rectangle flags made from?

They’re printed on a high-quality polyester-nylon blend material. 

#### Can my flag signage be double-sided?

Yes, you can have it printed single or double-sided. Bear in mind that the single-sided option will be mirrored on the reverse side. So if you need messaging to be readable on both sides, then order your flag double-sided. 

![Single-reverse or double-sided flags | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-4-28-BAN-rectangle-flags-reversed-600x310-riot1.jpg)

#### How do I order the flag only?

In the Pole Hardware menu select the “No - (Flag Only)” option. 

#### What is the lifespan of your custom made flags?

With proper care and installation, our custom flags have an outdoor life span of 3 to 6 months. We recommend that you take your flag down and store indoors during inclement weather to help increase its lifespan.

#### Do rectangle flags come with a warranty?

Yes, we offer a warranty on a prorated monthly basis for our custom rectangle flags.

For example, a prorated warranty on a  rectangle flag that fails 2 months after proper installment will be replaced and we will cover 33% of the replacement cost for a new [rectangle flag](https://www.banners.com/custom-flags/rectangle-flags).

#### What are my pole pocket color options?

We offer the following: 

**Black Pocket** 

![Black pole pocket on rectangle flag.](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/24-12-06-BANS-Flag-Pole-Sleeve-Color-Images-Rectangle-Black-Sleeve.jpg)

White Pocket

![White pole pocket on rectangle flag.](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/24-12-06-BANS-Flag-Pole-Sleeve-Color-Images-Rectangle-White-Sleeve.jpg)

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
